title: VersionRecommendation
description: Output of bin/recommend-version.sh — suggest the next semver version from commit history. Consumed by skills/release/SKILL.md.

status.description: ok = commits found and version computed; no-commits = no commits since the last tag; no-tags = no prior tags found (first release).

current.description: The current version derived from the latest tag. Null when no prior tags exist.

bump.description: The type of semver bump applied. 'first' when no prior tags exist. 'none' when no commits since last tag.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this bump was chosen.

from.description: The git ref (tag or SHA) the commit range was measured from.
